summary: Critical gaps: test file ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 missing but referenced in workflow. Workflow violates explicit requirement—uses `shell: bash` with pwsh heredoc (lines 18–36) instead of required `shell: pwsh`. Missing: actionlint validation step, fixture-based test harness for act, act-result.txt generation. Actions unpinned to SHAs. Script lacks Set-StrictMode. Incomplete delivery against task requirements.
